description: SQL Injection — user-supplied id parameter directly concatenated into SQL query string without parameterization
Reflected XSS — GET parameter 'name' echoed directly into HTML response without any encoding or sanitization
Stored XSS — guestbook comment and name stored in database and rendered without HTML encoding, enabling persistent XSS attacks
Command Injection — user-controlled 'ip' parameter appended directly to shell_exec ping command without sanitization
File Inclusion (LFI/RFI) — GET parameter 'page' used directly as the file path to include without any validation or path restriction
